purpose: This repository provides a reusable NServiceBus integration library for .NET applications within the Crb.Cos ecosystem. It offers configuration, extensions, utilities and standardized patterns for implementing NServiceBus messaging.
businessFeatures: Integration with New Relic for monitoring
Environment variable configuration for app settings and connection strings

apis.endpoint: CrbHostBuilder.CreateHostBuilder - Creates a standard host for NServiceBus endpoints
apis.purpose: CrbHostBuilder.CreateHostBuilder - Creates a standard host for NServiceBus endpoints

apis.endpoint: MessageExtensions - Extensions for sending/publishing messages with headers
apis.purpose: MessageExtensions - Extensions for sending/publishing messages with headers

findings.title: The library uses a custom trace ID format compatible with OpenTelemetry but implemented manually rather than using the OpenTelemetry SDK
findings.description: The library uses a custom trace ID format compatible with OpenTelemetry but implemented manually rather than using the OpenTelemetry SDK

findings.title: The repository contains configuration for interfacing with both MassTransit and NServiceBus messaging systems, suggesting a migration or interoperability scenario
findings.description: The repository contains configuration for interfacing with both MassTransit and NServiceBus messaging systems, suggesting a migration or interoperability scenario

findings.title: Uses GuidComb for message IDs (presumably for chronological ordering while maintaining uniqueness)
findings.description: Uses GuidComb for message IDs (presumably for chronological ordering while maintaining uniqueness)

keyFiles.path: src/Crb.Cos.Commons.Nsb.Core/BusExtensions.cs - Core extensions for configuring NServiceBus endpoints
src/Crb.Cos.Commons.Nsb.Core/WellKnownHeadersMutator.cs - Manages propagation of trace IDs and other headers across messages
src/Crb.Cos.Commons.Nsb.Core/Features/NewRelicFeature.cs - Integrates NServiceBus metrics with New Relic monitoring
src/Crb.Cos.Commons.Nsb.Core/Interoperability/MassTransitMessageIngestBehavior.cs - Enables processing MassTransit messages in NServiceBus
src/Crb.Cos.Commons.Nsb.Core/Healthchecks/NServiceBusHealthCheck.cs - Provides health check for RabbitMQ connection
src/Crb.Cos.Commons.Nsb.Host/CrbHostBuilder.cs - Entry point for creating standardized NServiceBus host
src/Crb.Cos.Commons.Nsb.Host/HostingExtensions.cs - Extensions for configuring the host builder
src/Crb.Cos.Commons.Nsb.Core/Features/TraceIdPropagationFeature.cs - Manages distributed tracing across service boundaries
